content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — App/SettingsView.swift:11 user-facing string "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" describes a shipped feature as unstable/experimental to end users.
Pierre: Apple's 2.2 concerns are about shipping unfinished/beta builds, and while this isn't TestFlight-style beta language, telling users a feature "may be unstable and lose sort order" reads like an admission the feature is unfinished, which reviewers may flag under app completeness (2.1) or question during review. Fix by either stabilizing AI Sort before submission or rewording the label to something reassuring like "Beta features aside, this new sorting option can be turned off anytime" — avoid words implying instability or data loss risk.
